exercises.title: Longer Thoughts
exercises.instruction: Divide this long sentence into smaller thought groups. Pause at the slashes.
exercises.targetText: I think we should review the proposal carefully, and then we can make a decision tomorrow.
chunks: I think we should review the proposal carefully,
and then we can make a decision tomorrow.
tips: The first chunk introduces the review process
The second chunk talks about the decision
Pause briefly after 'carefully' to separate the thoughts

exercises.title: Complex Instructions
exercises.instruction: Break these instructions into clear chunks. Each chunk should contain a complete idea.
exercises.targetText: First, save your work, then close the application, and finally restart your computer.
tips: Each chunk is a step in the process
The words 'First', 'then', and 'finally' help mark each chunk

exercises.title: Natural Rhythm
exercises.instruction: Listen to the model and speak along with it. Match the timing and pauses.
exercises.targetText: I'll get back to you, as soon as possible.
tips: Speak at the same speed as the model
Match the stress pattern: get and possible are stressed

exercises.title: Linking Within Chunks
exercises.instruction: Practice linking words within thought groups. Link smoothy: back_to you.
tips: Link 'back-to' smoothly - the k connects to t
Link 'to-you' smoothly - vowel to vowel connection
